Package
Description
com.falkordb.graph_entities
Graph entity value types returned by query results: Node, Edge, Path, Point, and their Properties.

    Description
    Edge
    A class represent an edge (graph entity).
    GraphEntity
    This is an abstract class for representing a graph entity.
